## Checklist

**Essential Requirements:**

- [ ] Before commit run biome linters and checks (`yarn precommit`) - manually or via Husky precommit hook
- [ ] Tests pass (`yarn test`)
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] Self-review completed

**Release Management:**

- [ ] Changeset created using `yarn changeset` (for features and fixes)
- [ ] ADR created in `adr/` directory (if architectural changes)
